semantic.role: Static content module providing few-shot examples for semantic role description generation.
responsibilities: Defines quality standards for role descriptions through concrete good/bad examples.
Supplies template content for prompt engineering within the ArchSpine summarization pipeline.
outOfScope: Dynamic example generation or runtime logic.
Validation or parsing of the example content.
invariants: Content is a static, hard-coded string constant.
Exported symbol is a read-only template literal.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: To provide canonical, high-quality examples that guide the generation of semantic role descriptions, ensuring consistency and precision across the ArchSpine system.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Restored or updated LLM-authored markdown generation content, likely to reinstate or improve the example set used for prompting.
